headline: EQT Stock Gains 31% in a Year: Here's What Investors Should Know
summary: EQT shares rise 31% in a year as rising natural gas demand, stronger prices and robust free cash flow boost the outlook, though higher costs and price volatility pose risks.

headline: Venture Global Inks LNG Supply Pact With Trafigura Group
summary: VG signs a five-year LNG supply deal with Trafigura starting 2026 for 0.5 MTPA, boosting contracted volumes, portfolio diversification and cash flow stability.
